reviews.comment:
Mala atención. No funcionaba la lectora de YPF justo un día de descuento. Los playeros no ofrecen ningún servicio extra, súlo la obligación de repostar combustible. Muy buena la limpieza de los sanitarios. Mala atención en el market, con precios muy caros. H

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. The YPF fuel reader wasn't working on the day of the discount. The attendants don't offer any extra services, just the obligation to refuel. The restrooms were very clean. Poor service at the convenience store, with very high prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMWU2a2dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y mucha variedad de comidas para elegir. Tiene un pelotero para los mas chicos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and a wide variety of food to choose from. There's also a ball pit for children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMHVqU1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para tener un descanso y comer algo. Hay mesas y bancos de cemento y buena arboleda. Varios perros amigables que se acercan para que les des algo para comer.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to rest and have something to eat. There are cement tables and benches and a nice grove of trees. Several friendly dogs will come up to you hoping for a treat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncjdhRlFBEAE
